name: Lentil Rice Burgers
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the long-grain rice until cooked and slightly sticky (about 20 minutes using basmati rice).
2. Cook the lentils until soft.
3. Cool both the rice and lentils slightly.
4. Peel and finely mince a medium sweet potato, then cook until soft. Cool slightly.
5. Finely chop the mushrooms. Rinely rinse and finely shred the spinach leaves.
6. Mix all ingredients together with salt and pepper to taste.
7. Chill in the refrigerator for 15-30 minutes.
8. Form into patties and sauté in a pan, or grill on an outdoor grill (make sure to grease or spray the pan with Pam as these burgers may stick).
9. Note: any added oil or fat will not be reflected in the nutrition values; simply add this manually if needed.
Nutrition (per serving):
268 calories
Total Fat 2 g (7% of calories)
